creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: I made a mistake.  I changed 1777 into 1770 and forgot to set the group to haclient.  I'm really reluctant to make it 1777.  That allows any user to interfere with pacemaker by create files or sockets there with names that pacemaker wants to use.  Isn't it possible to let qpid use haclient as group?
